data.content: Implemented colorized --help output in scripts/install.sh. The usage() function now uses bold+cyan for the Usage header, bold for Commands header, cyan for command names, and dim for the help command. Falls back gracefully to plain text when NO_COLOR is set, terminal is dumb, or stdout is not a TTY. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, test, build). Branch: feat/help-colors.
